$comment: Canonical MCP server definitions. Edit here, then run sync-mcp.sh to regenerate per-tool configs. Each server entry uses the Gemini CLI / Cursor schema (`type` + `url` for HTTP; `command` + `args` for stdio).

context7.$note: Upstash Context7 — current docs lookup for libraries, frameworks, SDKs. Already available in Claude Code via the Claude.ai integration (no local config needed). Configured locally for Gemini CLI / Codex / Cursor.
